steps.title: Recognize the square
steps.content: The right side is $(22)(22)=22^2$, so the equation is $$x^2=22^2.$$

steps.title: Take both square roots
steps.content: If $x^2=22^2$, then $x=22$ or $x=-22$. Squaring either value gives the same result.

steps.title: Choose the positive solution
steps.content: The question asks for the positive solution, so keep $22$ and reject $-22$. The answer is 22.
